ground_truth_fix: Root Cause The fourth argument to bpf_perf_event_output should be a pointer to the data to post on the ring buffer. Hence, you want to pass event as the argument, not &event.

candidate_repairs.patch_hint: Re-derive the pointer from a verified base immediately before dereference.
